name: LearnSpace Academy
description: Modern online learning platform offering expert-led courses in technology, business, design, and personal development.

hero.heading: Unlock your potential with expert-led courses
hero.subheading: Join thousands of learners mastering new skills in technology, business, and design with courses created by industry professionals.

services.name: Web Development
services.desc: Master modern frameworks — React, Next.js, Node.js and full-stack development.

services.name: UI/UX Design
services.desc: Learn design thinking, Figma, prototyping and user research from top designers.

services.name: Data Science
services.desc: Python, machine learning, analytics and AI — the skills employers want most.

services.name: Digital Marketing
services.desc: SEO, social media, paid ads and content strategy to grow any brand.

services.name: Business & Leadership
services.desc: Strategy, management, entrepreneurship and negotiation skills.

services.name: Creative Arts
services.desc: Photography, video production, illustration and motion graphics.

about.heading: Education that works for you
about.body: LearnSpace was built on a simple belief: world-class education should be accessible to everyone. Our courses combine practical, project-based learning with mentorship from industry leaders — so you don't just learn theory, you build real skills that employers value.

values.title: Project-Based Learning
values.desc: Build real projects, not just watch lectures.

values.title: Expert Instructors
values.desc: Learn from professionals working at top companies.

values.title: Learn Anywhere
values.desc: Mobile-friendly courses you can take on the go.

values.title: Certificates
values.desc: Earn credentials recognized by employers worldwide.

testimonials.quote: LearnSpace completely changed my career trajectory. I went from a junior role to a senior developer in 8 months thanks to their project-based curriculum.
testimonials.name: Alex Kim

testimonials.quote: The design courses are incredible — practical, well-structured, and taught by real professionals. I landed my dream job three months after completing the program.
testimonials.name: Maya Torres

testimonials.quote: As a career changer, I needed flexible learning. LearnSpace delivered — I studied evenings and weekends and now work full-time in data science.
testimonials.name: Daniel Obi

pricing.name: Free

pricing.name: Pro

pricing.name: Teams
pricing.desc: Train your entire team with dedicated support.

cta.heading: Start learning today — for free
cta.subheading: Join 50,000+ learners already building their future. No credit card required.

contact.heading: Questions?
